name: ByteBrew
description: Free all-in-one mobile game growth platform with analytics, monetization tracking, remote config and attribution.

seo.title: ByteBrew — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: ByteBrew: Free all-in-one mobile game growth platform with analytics, monetization tracking, remote config and attribution.

when_to_use: Free all-in-one analytics + attribution + remote config for mobile games
Monetization tracking across IAP and ad revenue in single dashboard
Remote config A/B tests for game balancing without code deploys
Install attribution with event tracking for indie game studios

pros: Free plan covers analytics, attribution and remote config
Ad monetization tracking out of the box
Unity and Unreal SDKs with fast setup
cons: Support and docs thinner than enterprise tools
Advanced MMP fraud tooling less mature
review.verdict: Generous free tier makes it attractive for indie game studios, but enterprise rigor is not there yet.
review.best_for: Indie and mid-size mobile game studios needing free all-in-one analytics plus attribution.
review.not_for: Large publishers with strict SLAs or non-game app verticals.
